authorization.title: Authorize Plaid
authorization.description: Click the following link to authenticate Plaid, then continue: [Authorize]({hosted_link})

error.missing_credentials: Client ID and Secret are required.
error.invalid_credentials: Could not create a link token. Check your Client ID and Secret.
error.invalid_link_token: Authorization was not completed. Please try again.
error.invalid_public_token: Failed to exchange the public token.
error.invalid_access_token: Could not retrieve accounts for this item.

data_description.enable_transactions: Store all transactions permanently and fire Logbook events for new ones.

get_transactions.name: Get transactions
get_transactions.description: Return the full, permanently-stored transaction ledger.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry
config_entry_id.description: Limit results to a single Plaid config entry.

account_id.name: Account ID
account_id.description: Limit results to a single account.

start_date.name: Start date
start_date.description: Only include transactions on or after this date.

end_date.name: End date
end_date.description: Only include transactions on or before this date.
